Designed with Intention, Worn with Confidence Velmora was born from a belief that fine jewelry should not be reserved for special occasions alone. 
              Every piece in our collection is designed to feel as at home at a morning meeting as it does at an evening gala — 
              versatile, enduring, and undeniably yours. gold jewelry making craftsmanship artisan
